author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit bd59ce9d. Added SemiStructuredSparseTensor<T> with compressed values + 4-bit-per-group mask storage matching the NVIDIA Sparse Tensor Core format. compress() picks the 2 largest-magnitude positions per group of 4 (lower-index tie-breaking), decompress() restores the dense layout with zeros at masked positions. sparse_matmul_24 reference implementation validates shape + inner-dim match and produces numerically-correct output. 13 tests cover compression semantics, mask packing, round-trip, edge cases, sparse matmul correctness, cross-check against apply_2_4_mask, and f64 parity. 1002 ferrotorch-core tests pass.
